# @platform/adapters-ingestion

External data ingestion adapter package for receiving, validating, and normalizing external data.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @platform/adapters-ingestion
Version: 0.1.0
Component: adapters-ingestion
Type: library
System: enterprise-react-platform
Domain: integration
Bounded context: external-ingestion-runtime
Owner: team-data
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: active
Role: adapter
Class: active.adapter
Catalog lifecycle: production
Visibility: internal
Support level: standard
Review cadence: quarterly
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-data
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: true
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Own external ingestion runtime adapters
- Validate external data against ingestion contracts
- Normalize external data into governed transactional and analytical write boundaries

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not own external source contract definitions
- Does not bypass profile/configuration or analytical contract packages
- Does not render React components

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Used by backend/runtime ingestion workers
- Consumes ingestion contracts and emits normalized writes through storage adapters
